violations.text: Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The grout in the tile floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026
The hood systems was observed with an excess of debris, the hood system must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and grates for the 1-door reach-in by the fryolators have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
The entry for the walk-in freezer was observed with excess ice around the door jamb. Establishment is to remove excess ice from freezer door jamb. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
The floor grout in the kitchen and the tiles by the mop sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026
The caulk behind the 3-bay is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
Grout on tile floor was observed to be in poor repair. Grout shall be repaired New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
